ground_truth.title: Graph Neural Networks for Real-Time Transaction Fraud Detection
ground_truth.abstract: We model payment networks as dynamic heterogeneous graphs and apply temporal GNNs to detect fraudulent transactions with sub-millisecond latency, outperforming XGBoost baselines on industry datasets.
